creator: bazylt@gtut.internetdsl.pl
text:
The system is hinged during loading kernel from bootable CDROM (6.1-RELEASE-sparc64-disc1 & 6.1-RELEASE-sparc64-bootonly)
The message on console:
Booting [/boot/kernel/kernel]...
nothing to autoload yet
jumping to kernel entry at 0xc0060000

The same problem on the Enterprise 250
